summary: Synthesis-boundary review accepted. The candidate records a bounded ClinicalTrials.gov retrieval failure follow-up and updates the senolytics coverage assessment while keeping the registry-surveillance and review-landscape gaps open. It does not create source-backed registry evidence, findings, results, synthesis groups, pooled estimates, or human longevity efficacy claims from the failed importer attempts.

findings.claim_or_issue: The proposed coverage assessment describes ClinicalTrials.gov DNS/importer failures for deferred fisetin and senolytics registry candidates.
findings.why_it_matters: A failed retrieval attempt is operational provenance, not evidence that a registry is active, completed, or has no posted results.
findings.recommended_action: Accept the lane because the candidate does not create registry evidence records from the failures and explicitly keeps the registry-surveillance gap open until retained source snapshots support extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: The candidate proposes only its own candidate_change record and an update to a coverage_assessment record.
findings.why_it_matters: Registry-surveillance breadth and coverage maturity are not poolable intervention, comparator, population, endpoint, duration, design, effect, or risk-of-bias strata.
findings.recommended_action: Accept the lane because no synthesis_group, result, effect-size record, meta-analysis readiness claim, or pooled analysis boundary is proposed.

findings.claim_or_issue: The coverage assessment remains a vertical-slice triage summary with open registry, review-landscape, and full-text safety extraction gaps.
findings.why_it_matters: Senolytics evidence includes preclinical, pilot, disease-specific, and registry-only slices that must not be converted into generalized human longevity efficacy claims.
findings.recommended_action: Accept the lane because the proposed text preserves thin and triage-summary limitations and does not infer human longevity efficacy from operational retrieval failures or incomplete registry surveillance.
